steps.title: Restrict the sample
steps.content:
The condition is that the participant is at least $10$ years old. From the table, the total number of participants in the qualifying age groups is:
$$30+30=60$$

steps.title: Count group A
steps.content:
Within those same qualifying age groups, group A has:
$$11+4=15$$

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content:
Use the restricted sample as the denominator.
$$\frac{15}{60}=\frac{1}{4}$$
The answer is B.
